panels.title: Aggregate PnL (from backtest day 0) — Strategy ${strategy_id}
panels.description: Absolute cumulative PnL (not window-rebased). Shows where the strategy currently stands from its origin.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfDay(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(cumulative_pnl) ELSE sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Production PnL` FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) FINAL WHERE strategy_table_name LIKE 'sid=${strategy_id}|%' AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, `Backtest PnL`, `Benchmark` FROM (SELECT time, `Backtest PnL`, `Benchmark`, n_strats, max(n_strats) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS trailing_max FROM (SELECT toStartOfDay(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(cumulative_pnl) ELSE sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Backtest PnL`, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(benchmark * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(benchmark) ELSE sum(benchmark * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Benchmark`, uniq(strategy_table_name) AS n_strats FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) FINAL WHERE strategy_table_name LIKE 'sid=${strategy_id}|%' AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time)) WHERE n_strats >= trailing_max * 0.65 ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfDay(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(cumulative_pnl) ELSE sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Real Trade PnL` FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) FINAL WHERE strategy_table_name LIKE 'sid=${strategy_id}|%' AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Aggregate PnL (from 0%) — Strategy ${strategy_id}
panels.description: All instances combined, rebased to 0% at the left edge of the selected time window. Production vs Backtest vs Benchmark.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(p * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(p) ELSE sum(p * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Production PnL` FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) FINAL WHERE strategy_table_name LIKE 'sid=${strategy_id}|%' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, `Backtest PnL`, `Benchmark` FROM (SELECT time, `Backtest PnL`, `Benchmark`, n_strats, max(n_strats) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 30 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS trailing_max FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(p * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(p) ELSE sum(p * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Backtest PnL`, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(b * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(b) ELSE sum(b * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Benchmark`, uniq(strategy_table_name) AS n_strats FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p, benchmark - first_value(benchmark) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS b FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) FINAL WHERE strategy_table_name LIKE 'sid=${strategy_id}|%' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) AS t GROUP BY time ORDER BY time)) WHERE n_strats >= trailing_max * 0.65 ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(p * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(p) ELSE sum(p * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Real Trade PnL` FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) FINAL WHERE strategy_table_name LIKE 'sid=${strategy_id}|%' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, agg_pnl - max(agg_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Production Drawdown` FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(p * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(p) ELSE sum(p * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS agg_pnl FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) FINAL WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) GROUP BY time) ORDER BY time

SELECT time, agg_pnl - max(agg_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Backtest Drawdown` FROM (SELECT time, agg_pnl FROM (SELECT time, agg_pnl, n_strats, max(n_strats) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 30 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS trailing_max FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(p * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(p) ELSE sum(p * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS agg_pnl, uniq(strategy_table_name) AS n_strats FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) FINAL WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) AS t GROUP BY time ORDER BY time)) WHERE n_strats >= trailing_max * 0.65) ORDER BY time

SELECT time, agg_bm - max(agg_bm) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Benchmark Drawdown` FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(b * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(b) ELSE sum(b * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS agg_bm FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, benchmark - first_value(benchmark) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS b FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) FINAL WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) GROUP BY time) ORDER BY time

SELECT time, agg_pnl - max(agg_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Real Trade Drawdown` FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(p * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(p) ELSE sum(p * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS agg_pnl FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) FINAL WHERE (empty('${strategy_id}') OR strategy_id = ${strategy_id}) AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) GROUP BY time) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Aggregate Position — Strategy ${strategy_id}
panels.description: Aggregated position across all instances of this strategy. Aggregation follows the selected PnL mode (rescaled/raw weighted/equal weighted).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(position * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(position) ELSE sum(position * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Production Position` FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) FINAL WHERE strategy_table_name LIKE 'sid=${strategy_id}|%' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, `Backtest Position` FROM (SELECT time, `Backtest Position`, n_strats, max(n_strats) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS trailing_max FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(position * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(position) ELSE sum(position * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Backtest Position`, uniq(strategy_table_name) AS n_strats FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) FINAL WHERE strategy_table_name LIKE 'sid=${strategy_id}|%' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time)) WHERE n_strats >= trailing_max * 0.65 ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(position * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(position) ELSE sum(position * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Real Trade Position` FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) FINAL WHERE strategy_table_name LIKE 'sid=${strategy_id}|%' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Per-Instance Position — Strategy ${strategy_id}
panels.description: Individual position for each instance within this strategy. Each line is one strategy_table_name.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfFiveMinutes(ts) AS time, strategy_table_name, argMax(position, ts) AS position FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) FINAL WHERE strategy_table_name LIKE 'sid=${strategy_id}|%' AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time, strategy_table_name ORDER BY time

list.name: strategy_id
list.label: Strategy ID
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT toString(strategy_id) FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 ORDER BY strategy_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT toString(strategy_id) FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 ORDER BY strategy_id

list.name: mode
list.label: PnL Mode
list.query: Rescaled : rescaled,Raw Weighted : raw_weighted,Equal Weighted : equal
list.description: Rescaled: sum(pnl*w)/sum(w) — normalized to 100%. Raw Weighted: sum(pnl*w) — actual portfolio contribution. Equal Weighted: avg(pnl) — every instance equal.
